steps.title: Determine requirements for line j
steps.content: Line $k$: $y = 8x + 7$ has slope $8$. Line $j$ is parallel to $k$, so it must have the same slope: $m_j = 8$. Line $j$ also passes through $(0, 15)$, which is the $y$-intercept, so $b = 15$.

steps.title: Test all four choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — $y = 15x + 7$: Slope $= 15 eq 8$. Not parallel to $k$. ✗
  • Choice B — $y = -15x + 7$: Slope $= -15 eq 8$. Not parallel to $k$. ✗
  • Choice C — $y = 8x + 15$: Slope $= 8$ (parallel to $k$) and passes through $(0,15)$. ✓
  • Choice D — $y = -8x + 15$: Slope $= -8 eq 8$. Not parallel to $k$ (perpendicular slopes would be $- rac{1}{8}$, not $-8$). ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
